name: resume-website
description: Full-stack resume website with FastAPI backend and React frontend

scripts.install:backend: cd backend && python3 -m venv venv && source venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.install:all: npm run install:backend && npm run install:frontend
scripts.lint: cd backend && flake8 app tests && black --check app tests && isort --check app tests && cd ../frontend && npm run lint
scripts.lint:fix: cd backend && black app tests && isort app tests && cd ../frontend && npx eslint --fix src && npx prettier --write src
scripts.test: cd backend && python3 -m pytest && cd ../frontend && npx vitest run
scripts.test:coverage: cd backend && python3 -m pytest --cov=app --cov-report=term-missing --cov-fail-under=90 && cd ../frontend && npx vitest run --coverage
